dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6059 IH: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 50 East 100 North in Moab, Utah, as the “2nd Lieutenant Mitchell Williams Post Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Kennedy of Utah introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 50 East 100 North in Moab, Utah, as the 2nd Lieutenant Mitchell Williams Post Office.

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 50 East 100 North in Moab, Utah, as the 2nd Lieutenant Mitchell Williams Post Office.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the 2nd Lieutenant Mitchell Williams Post Office.
